description: This is the 5th in the 5 volume series detailing the unit histories and rosters of the 28th including photographs of most of the men. This volume includes the list of decorations, casualties, and a complete index for all 5 volumes.
subject: Great War
World War 1
Spanish American War
Pennsylvania
Guard
28th Division
Phillipines
title: The 28th Division: Pennsylvania's Guard in World War 1 Volume 5
